repo_changes.purpose: declare the control-owned default sync helper path and its default-path predicate
reprovision the default sync helper to the repo-owned helper payload even when a legacy script is present
ensure sync owner-path execution uses the repo-owned default helper before subprocess execution
apply the same default-helper reprovisioning to other sync-owner invocation sites
repopulate selected_backend_ids from the live-capable registry lane so sync can materialize a fresh nested selector snapshot on the real default helper path

test_changes.purpose: prove default sync path gets reprovisioned to the repo-owned helper
move default sync success tests onto stable listener semantics
regress a sync override that tries to restamp managed truth after stable activation evidence exists
prove the default repo-owned sync helper repopulates selected_backend_ids from the live-capable registry when prior state was empty

non_goals: do not modify selector snapshot materialization logic
do not change explicit WBP_SYNC_SCRIPT override semantics
do not reopen auth-source work inside this contour
